title: [packit] Propose downstream failed for release v4.8.0
body:
Packit failed on creating pull-requests in dist-git (https://src.fedoraproject.org/rpms/python-podman.git):

| dist-git branch | error |
| --------------- | ----- |
| `f38` | See https://dashboard.packit.dev/results/propose-downstream/5106 |
| `f39` | See https://dashboard.packit.dev/results/propose-downstream/5107 |
| `rawhide` | See https://dashboard.packit.dev/results/propose-downstream/5105 |


You can retrigger the update by adding a comment (`/packit propose-downstream`) into this issue.

comments.body: Closing. We have v4.8.2 in fedora https://src.fedoraproject.org/rpms/python-podman
